page_title: How to apply for a visitor visa - Canada.ca

h2: Get specific instructions on how to apply
You may be eligible to apply for a Super Visa
You’re coming to Canada to visit for business
You’re coming to Canada for compassionate reasons
You’re coming to Canada to visit your family
You’re coming to Canada to attend a FIFA World Cup 2026TM match
You’re coming to Canada as a visitor
You’re coming to Canada to join a vessel as a marine crew member
You’re coming to Canada to visit your spouse or partner who has sponsored you for permanent residence
You’re coming to Canada to visit as a tourist
h3: Check if your local visa office requires additional documents
Gather the rest of the documents you might need
IRCC Portal – New version : Option 2 of 2
Apply through the IRCC Secure account
Give your biometrics after you apply (if applicable)

sections.heading: On this page
bullets: Gather your required documents
Get specific instructions on how to apply

sections.heading: Gather your required documents
items: All applicants need to include
When you apply online, you’ll get a personalized document checklist in the portal. Make sure you provide all the documents listed on the checklist.
bullets: a digital copy of your valid (not expired) passport or travel document
a letter that authorizes a minor child to travel to Canada (if applicable) You may need to include other documents , depending on whether the minor child travels alone or not.
You may need to include other documents , depending on whether the minor child travels alone or not.

sections.heading: Check if your local visa office requires additional documents
items: Your visa office may require additional documents. Tell us where you’re applying from to get the visa office requirements for your country or territory.

sections.heading: Get specific instructions on how to apply
items: Tell us the purpose of your visit to get the next steps for your situation.

sections.heading: You may be eligible to apply for a Super Visa
items: A super visa lets you visit your children or grandchildren for 5 years at a time. It’s a visa that provides multiple entries for a period up to 10 years.
Find out how to apply for a Super Visa

sections.heading: You’re coming to Canada to visit for business
items: To apply for a visitor visa to visit Canada on business, you need to qualify as a business visitor .
To qualify, you must show that
Business visitor activities include business meetings, special events or training for a few days or weeks.
If your meeting, event or conference is registered with us, include the event code in your application. You should get this code from the organizer.
bullets: you plan to stay for less than 6 months
you don’t plan to enter the Canadian labour market
your main place of business and source of income and profits is outside Canada

sections.heading: You’re coming to Canada for compassionate reasons
You’re coming to Canada to visit your family
You’re coming to Canada to attend a FIFA World Cup 2026TM match
You’re coming to Canada as a visitor
items: Make sure one of the above situations doesn’t describe you.

sections.heading: You’re coming to Canada to join a vessel as a marine crew member
You’re coming to Canada to visit your spouse or partner who has sponsored you for permanent residence
You’re coming to Canada to visit as a tourist
Gather the rest of the documents you might need
items: Your document checklist may include supporting documents such as the following:
bullets: Family Information (IMM 5645) form
Use of a representative (IMM 5476) (opens in a new tab) (if using an authorized representative)

Authority to Release Personal Information to a Designated Individual (IMM 5475) form (opens in a new tab) (if authorizing information from your case file to be released to someone other than yourself)

sections.heading: Pay your fees
items: We’ll ask you to pay your fees at the end of your application. You’ll need a valid credit or debit card.
In most cases, your fees will include processing fees and biometrics fees for you and for anyone you included on your application.
Some applicants may be exempt from paying some or all fees.

sections.heading: Submit your application
IRCC Portal
items: You can use the IRCC Portal to apply for a visitor visa.
Go to the IRCC Portal

sections.heading: IRCC Portal : Option 1 of 2
items: You can use the IRCC Portal to apply for a visitor visa.

sections.heading: IRCC Portal – New version : Option 2 of 2
items: You may be able to use the IRCC Portal – New version if you:
bullets: are 18 years of age or older
are applying alone
have never applied for anything with us before
are not using a representative (including family or friends applying for you)

sections.heading: Apply through the IRCC Secure account
items: Sign in to your IRCC secure account

sections.heading: Give your biometrics after you apply (if applicable)
items: Wait for your biometrics instruction letter, and then book your biometrics collection appointment as soon as possible to avoid processing delays.
Give your biometrics
